categories.name: Things that jingle in your pocket

decoys.category_a: Things that jingle in your pocket
decoys.reason_a: Loose change is coins you carry that make jingling sounds.
decoys.reason_b: To change yourself is a common way to improve or grow.

other_trick: BEAT and TAP can also suggest actions you do to improve (beat your record, tap into potential), and SPIKE could tempt toward volleyball or punk hairstyles.

thinking.all_16_words: POUND ROLL BEAT TAP KEYS CHANGE LINT RECEIPTS BUFFY SPIKE WILLOW ANGEL GROW STRETCH ADAPT EVOLVE

anchors.meaning_a: a repeated hitting sound or action

anchors.home_category: Things that jingle in your pocket

anchors.meaning_b: a bread item or to tumble
